name: nest-protect-mcp
description: 🔥 Production-ready FastMCP 2.14.3 server for Google Nest Protect devices with conversational AI, sampling capabilities, real-time monitoring, intelligent device control, and advanced AI orchestration
author: Sandra Schiessl

nest_client_id.title: Nest OAuth Client ID
nest_client_id.description: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 Client ID for Nest API

nest_client_secret.title: Nest OAuth Client Secret
nest_client_secret.description: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 Client Secret for Nest API

nest_project_id.title: Google Cloud Project ID
nest_project_id.description: Google Cloud Project ID with Smart Device Management API enabled

nest_refresh_token.title: Nest OAuth Refresh Token
nest_refresh_token.description: OAuth 2.0 refresh token for Nest API authentication

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List all Nest Protect devices in your account with current status

tools.name: get_device_status
tools.description: Get detailed status information for a specific Nest Protect device

tools.name: get_device_events
tools.description: Retrieve recent events and activity for a Nest Protect device

tools.name: hush_alarm
tools.description: Silence an active alarm on a Nest Protect device

tools.name: run_safety_check
tools.description: Execute a safety check test on a Nest Protect device

tools.name: set_led_brightness
tools.description: Adjust the LED brightness level on a Nest Protect device

tools.name: sound_alarm
tools.description: Sound alarm tones for testing purposes (use responsibly)

tools.name: arm_disarm_security
tools.description: Arm or disarm Nest security system (Nest Guard/Secure)

tools.name: get_system_status
tools.description: Get overall system status and health information

tools.name: get_process_status
tools.description: Check the status of the Nest Protect MCP process

tools.name: get_api_status
tools.description: Check the status of Google Nest API connectivity

tools.name: list_available_tools
tools.description: List all available MCP tools with descriptions

tools.name: get_tool_help
tools.description: Get detailed help and usage information for a specific tool

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Search for tools by keyword or description

tools.name: about_server
tools.description: Get comprehensive information about the Nest Protect MCP server

tools.name: get_supported_devices
tools.description: Get information about supported Nest Protect device types

tools.name: initiate_oauth_flow
tools.description: Start OAuth 2.0 authentication flow with Google

tools.name: handle_oauth_callback
tools.description: Process OAuth 2.0 callback and obtain access tokens

tools.name: refresh_access_token
tools.description: Refresh OAuth 2.0 access token when expired

tools.name: get_config
tools.description: Get current server configuration settings

tools.name: update_config
tools.description: Update server configuration settings

tools.name: reset_config
tools.description: Reset configuration to default values

tools.name: export_config
tools.description: Export current configuration to a file

tools.name: import_config
tools.description: Import configuration from a file

tools.name: assess_home_safety
tools.description: AI-powered comprehensive home safety assessment with intelligent recommendations

tools.name: coordinate_emergency_response
tools.description: Coordinate emergency response using AI orchestration for safety incidents

tools.name: predict_maintenance_needs
tools.description: Predict future maintenance needs using AI analysis and pattern recognition

tools.name: setup_smart_automation
tools.description: Set up intelligent automation that learns user patterns and adapts
